entries.description: Connect the Docker MCP Toolkit to a client. Supported clients: claude-code claude-desktop cline codex continue crush cursor gemini goose gordon kiro lmstudio opencode sema4 vscode zed
entries.usage:
docker mcp client connect [OPTIONS] <mcp-client>

Supported clients: claude-code claude-desktop cline codex continue crush cursor gemini goose gordon kiro lmstudio opencode sema4 vscode zed

entries.description: Disconnect the Docker MCP Toolkit from a client. Supported clients: claude-code claude-desktop cline codex continue crush cursor gemini goose gordon kiro lmstudio opencode sema4 vscode zed
entries.usage:
docker mcp client disconnect [OPTIONS] <mcp-client>

Supported clients: claude-code claude-desktop cline codex continue crush cursor gemini goose gordon kiro lmstudio opencode sema4 vscode zed
